name: swoosh
description: Intent-driven, policy-driven model routing for TypeScript.

scripts.build: bun run --filter='@semafore/router' build && bun run --filter='@semafore/ai-sdk' build && bun run --filter='@semafore/capabilities' build && bun run --filter='@semafore/judge' build && bun run --filter='@semafore/sdk' build
